creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Alan Somers from comment #5)
> And I don't know of any reason why this shouldn't be the default.
There are still 2 known issues with usbhid

1. U2F/FIDO keys does not work reliable with hidraw. I wrote a fix https://reviews.freebsd.org/D41639 but as it is based on some hacks I did not commit it yet.

2. No more console support for USB mices. There is some slowly progressing ongoing work https://github.com/wulf7/moused/ but it still not reached committable shape
